title: Community Moderation Update: April 29, 2026
body:
Today we completed moderation of open reports:
1. User 'spam_wave_42' was banned for posting phishing links across multiple channels.
2. User 'toxic_runner' was banned for repeated targeted harassment of newcomers.
3. A false positive report against core maintainer was closed, as it was confirmed to be a mass brigading attempt.
We will continue to enforce community guidelines to keep our space safe and welcoming for all members.
